title: lithocarpus lampadarius
intro: Lithocarpus lampadarius, a species of evergreen tree native to China and Southeast Asia, is a member of the beech family (Fagaceae) and is also known as the Chinese evergreen or Chinese beech. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lithocarpus lampadarius include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and improve digestion. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
